issues.description: Trigger should be 'Counter' (activated during opponent's attack), not 'Activated'. The effect states '[On Your Opponent's Attack]'.
Action type 'RevealFromHand' is incorrect. The effect reveals from the top of opponent's deck, not hand. Should be a custom reveal-from-deck action or similar, not RevealFromHand.

Missing the cost-choice mechanic. The effect requires the player to 'Choose a cost' before revealing, and the power boost is conditional on the revealed card matching that cost. Current DSL has no condition checking card cost against chosen cost.
Condition should include 'Once Per Turn' limiter. Current DSL only checks HasRestingDon but lacks frequency restriction.
First ability (Leader has {Big Mom Pirates} type, Character gains [Rush]) is completely missing from DSL.
